item.title: Philippines: Tropical Cyclone Nari - Jul 2026
item.description:
Affected country: Philippines
Glide: TC-2026-000101-PHL

Tropical Cyclone Nari made landfall over Eastern Visayas on 3 July 2026, bringing destructive winds and storm surge to coastal municipalities.

item.title: Bangladesh: Floods - Jul 2026
item.description:
Affected country: Bangladesh
Glide: FL-2026-000102-BGD

Monsoon rains have flooded low-lying districts along the Jamuna river, displacing thousands of households.

item.title: Indonesia: Mount Merapi Eruption - Jul 2026
item.description:
Affected country: Indonesia
Glide: VO-2026-000200-IDN

Mount Merapi erupted on 7 July, sending ash column to 12,000 meters. Alert status raised to level 3. Evacuation ongoing within 5 km radius.
